Jul 22 · Wednesday · Day 1

Fly in & land in Jaco

1
Morning7:00 AM depart ORD

Fly to San Jose (SJO)

AA 1902 ORD → DFW 7:02-9:40a. 1:26 layover. AA 1053 DFW → SJO 11:06a-2:17p. Chicago group; NYC crew routes separately.

AA 1902 + AA 1053Land SJO 2:17pChicago group

Jul 23 · Thursday · Day 2

La Fortuna: volcano, waterfall & hot springs

Full-day tour6 AM pickupLunch + dinner included
1
Early6:00 AM

Pickup at the AirbnbBe ready 5:45

Guided tour pickup at the main entrance of Playa Hermosa Palms. Scenic ride to the Arenal area, ~3 hrs.

🎒 Pack a drawstring bag
SwimwearChange of clothesTowelSandalsComfortable shoesSunscreenSunglassesInsect repellent
Round-trip transportBilingual guide~3 hr drive
Open in MapsView tour details
🚌Scenic drive through volcanoes, plantations and jungle to La Fortuna
2
Late morning~10:00 AM

La Fortuna Waterfall

Swim in the pool at the base of Costa Rica's most iconic waterfall. Rainforest all around; steps down and back up.

Swim stopWaterfall entry includedBring sandals
Open in Maps
🚌Short drive to La Fortuna town for lunch
3
Midday~12:30 PM

Costa Rican lunchIncluded

Authentic lunch at a restaurant near La Fortuna town. Included in the tour.

Lunch includedLa Fortuna town
Open in Maps
🚌To the 1968 lava trails
4
Afternoon~2:00 PM

Lava trails & Arenal viewpoint

Hike the lava trails from the 1968 eruption and hit the main lookout for the best Arenal views on clear days.

Lava trail hikeVolcano lookoutTrail entry included
Open in Maps
🚌To Paradise Hot Springs at the volcano base
5
Late afternoon~4:00 PM

Paradise Hot Springs

Soak a couple of hours in the hot spring pools set in tropical gardens at the base of Arenal.

Hot springs included~2 hrsVolcano views

Morning8:00 AM

🚌~10 min to Plaza Tangeri for dinner
4
Evening7:15 PM

Dinner at Naans & CurriesReserve for the group

Indian dinner at Naans & Curries, Plaza Tangeri. Strong veg options for the group. Mains ₡7,990-12,990 (~$15-25); 13% tax + 10% service added.

Butter ChickenLamb Rogan JoshPaneer Tikka Masala (veg)Garlic naan
